article_title: Burnaby Council — 14.1. Attachment 1 - PDC - Determining TAP Eligibility 2026-03-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to consider new rules for determining tenant eligibility dates under Burnaby's TAP
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on a framework that would let staff decide whether tenants keep their original eligibility date when a rezoning application is resubmitted — protecting renters who may have moved out early based on earlier development promises.
briefs.action_required: If your rental property has an in-stream rezoning application, review whether tenant meetings and signed addendums are on file.
briefs.industries: Landlord & Property Mgmt, Tenant, Construction & Development
